title: Cleveland Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Cleveland, with a Z-Score of -3.31. This event has been classified as CRITICAL with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Cleveland are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The cold snap is expected to continue, with a high humidity level of 79% and moderate winds of 8.1 km/h. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) are at 12.6 GG, indicating a high energy demand for heating.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the effects of the cold snap immediately.
